mapper.sql: notification_id, store_id, user_id, target_role, type, title, content, related_type, related_id, is_read, created_at
mapper.insert:
insert into public.notifications
store_id, user_id, target_role, type, title, content, related_type, related_id, is_read, created_at,
#{storeId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{targetRole,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{relatedType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{relatedId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{isRead,jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, now(),
mapper.select: select count(*) from public.notifications where store_id = #{storeId,jdbcType=INTEGER} and is_read = false and user_id IS NULL
mapper.update: update public.notifications set is_read = true where store_id = #{storeId,jdbcType=INTEGER} and is_read = false and user_id IS NULL
update public.notifications set is_read = true where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and is_read = false
